title: Plasma Physics
shortSummary: The fourth state of matter — ionised gases, magnetic confinement, fusion energy, and the physics of stars and lightning.
whyItMatters: Plasma makes up 99% of the visible universe — stars, nebulae, and the solar wind are all plasma. On Earth, plasma physics is central to the quest for fusion energy, semiconductor manufacturing, and space propulsion.
coreConcepts: Space plasma and the solar wind
